title: Sheet processing apparatus, sheet processing method, and image forming system
abstract: A sheet processing apparatus includes a center folder, and a back-crimp binder. The center folder performs a center folding on a sheet bundle including multiple sheets. The back-crimp binder includes a back-portion former and a crimp binder. The back-portion former forms a back portion on the sheet bundle subjected to the center folding. The crimp binder performs a crimp binding on the sheet bundle subjected to the center folding.
claims:
Claims [CLAIMS] [Claim 1] A sheet processing apparatus comprising: a center folder to perform a center folding on a sheet bundle including multiple sheets; and a back-crimp binder including: a back-portion former to form a back portion on the sheet bundle subjected to the center folding; and a crimp binder to perform a crimp binding on the sheet bundle subjected to the center folding. [Claim 2] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 1, wherein the center folder includes: a folding plate to guide a part of the sheet bundle in a given direction; and a folding roller pair to: nip the sheet bundle guided by the folding plate; and advance the sheet bundle in the given direction. [Claim 3] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 2, wherein the back-crimp binder includes: the folding plate; and a folding-plate engagement member to engage with the folding plate via the sheet bundle. [Claim 4] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 3, wherein the folding-plate engagement member is biased toward the folding plate, and the folding-plate engagement member nips the back portion of the sheet bundle between the folding-plate engagement member and the folding plate and press the back portion of the sheet bundle. [Claim 5] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 4, further comprising a controller configured to control the center folder and the back-crimp binder, wherein the folding-plate engagement member includes a roller rotatable about an axis, and the controller is further configured to cause the folding-plate engagement member to: reciprocally move in a longitudinal direction of the back portion; and perform a back-portion-forming process to form the back portion on the sheet bundle and the crimp-binding process. [Claim 6] The sheet processing apparatus according to any one of claims 3 to 5, wherein the folding plate has first teeth having multiple protrusions and recesses on a face facing the folding-plate engagement member, and the folding-plate engagement member has second teeth having multiple protrusions and recesses to engage with the first teeth. [Claim 7] The sheet processing apparatus according to any one of claims 3 to 6, wherein the folding-plate engagement member moves in a longitudinal direction of the back portion of the sheet bundle to simultaneously perform a back-portion-forming process to form the back portion on the sheet bundle and the crimp binding. [Claim 8] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 6 or 7, wherein the folding plate has at least one first teeth group having multiple protrusions and recesses on a face facing the folding-plate engagement member, the folding-plate engagement member includes at least one second teeth group having intermittently multiple intermittent protrusions and recesses to engage with the at least one folding-plate crimping tooth group, and the folding plate moves toward the folding-plate engagement member to perform the crimp binding. [Claim 9] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 3, wherein the folding-plate engagement member includes a planar blade facing the folding plate, and the planar blade moves toward the folding plate to perform the crimp binding. [Claim 10] The sheet processing apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 9, wherein the back-crimp binder includes: a first roller having teeth; and a second roller to engage with the first roller via the sheet bundle. [Claim 11] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 6, wherein the folding -plate engagement member includes: a cylindrical portion having the second teeth; and flange portions disposed at both ends of the cylindrical portion and each having a diameter larger than a diameter of the cylindrical portion. [Claim 12] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 11, wherein the flange portions contact to each other from opposite sides of the cylindrical portion with respect to the sheet bundle nipped between the folding plate and the folding-plate engagement member. [Claim 13] The sheet processing apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 12, wherein the back-crimp binder is configured to form two fold lines parallel with each other in a longitudinal direction of the back portion of the sheet bundle. [Claim 14] 

The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 13, wherein the back portion of the sheet bundle is formed to have a substantially flat portion between the two fold lines parallel with each other. [Claim 15] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 6, wherein the engaging-crimping teeth portion has multiple continuous protrusions and recesses repeatedly formed with respect to a longitudinal direction of a back portion of the sheet bundle. [Claim 16] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 6, wherein the engaging-crimping teeth portion has multiple continuous protrusions and recesses repeatedly formed and inclined with respect to a longitudinal direction of a back portion of the sheet bundle. [Claim 17] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 6, wherein the folding plate has a folding-crimping teeth portion having multiple protrusions and recesses at multiple positions in a first portion on a face facing the folding-plate engagement member, and the folding plate has a flat portion in a second portion different from the first portion, on the face facing the folding-plate engagement member. [Claim 18] An image forming system comprising: an image forming apparatus to form an image on a sheet; and the sheet processing apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 17, disposed in an in-body ejection space of the image forming apparatus. [Claim 19] An image forming system comprising: an image forming apparatus to form an image on a sheet; and the sheet processing apparatus according to any one of claims 1 to 17, to perform a given process on the sheet on which the image has been formed by the image forming apparatus. [Claim 20] A sheet processing method comprising: performing a center folding, on a sheet bundle including multiple sheets; forming a back portion on the sheet bundle subjected to the center folding; and performing a crimp binding on the sheet bundle subjected to the center folding. [Claim 21] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 2, wherein the back-crimp binder further includes a folding -plate-engagement heater including a heater to heat the sheet bundle and press the sheet bundle against the folding plate, and 

the folding-plate-engagement heater heats an adhesive medium in an adhesive portion of the sheet bundle. [Claim 22] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 21, wherein the adhesive medium includes a toner image as a visible image. [Claim 23] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 21, wherein the folding-plate-engagement heater includes a roller rotatable around an axis, and the folding-plate-engagement heater reciprocally moves in a longitudinal direction of the back portion of the sheet bundle to performs perform a back-portion-forming process to form the back portion on the sheet bundle and the crimp binding. [Claim 24] The sheet processing apparatus according to claim 21, wherein the folding-plate-engagement heater includes a planar blade facing the folding plate, and the planar blade moves toward the folding plate to perform the crimp-binding. [Claim 25] An image forming system comprising: an image forming apparatus to form an image on a sheet; and the sheet processing apparatus according to any one of claims 21 to 24, to perform a given process on the sheet on which the image has been formed by the image forming apparatus.
